creator: db@FreeBSD.org
text:
Temporarily work around known asciidoc problem for now by including man pages
in port. I'll leave asciidoc in as a dependency for now.
See https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2015-March/098240.html
I've tracked it down to a2x doing a run time non allowed install from
the jail whilst internet is off.
